papers.title: Do AI Agents Know When a Task Is Simple? Toward Complexity-Aware Reasoning and Execution
papers.title_zh: AI 智能体知道任务何时简单吗？面向复杂度感知的推理与执行
papers.abstract: Large language model agents often follow a maximum-context-first strategy, turning simple edits into broad code-base audits. This work proposes E3: Estimate, Execute, Expand, a task-aware policy that starts with a minimum viable path and expands only when verification fails.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型智能体很少判断一项任务实际需要多少工作，常常重复读取已经查看过的文件和依赖，把一行修改扩展成小型代码库审计。论文提出 E3（估计、执行、扩展）策略：先评估任务难度和所需信息，执行最小可行路径，仅在验证失败时扩大范围。实验在保持任务成功率的同时显著降低了成本、Token 消耗和文件检查数量。

papers.title: Read It Back: Pretrained MLLMs Are Zero-Shot Reward Models for Text-to-Image Generation
papers.title_zh: 读回生成结果：预训练多模态大模型可作为文生图零样本奖励模型
papers.abstract: The paper introduces SpectraReward, a training-free reward model for text-to-image generation that reuses the image-text alignment capability of frozen multimodal large language models.
papers.abstract_zh: 论文提出无需训练的文生图奖励模型 SpectraReward，直接复用冻结多模态大模型已有的图文对齐能力。该方法能够稳定改善生成结果，并让统一多模态模型利用自身理解分支进行自我改进，在部分任务上达到或超过参数规模更大的外部奖励模型。

papers.title: Metacognition in LLMs: Foundations, Progress, and Opportunities
papers.title_zh: 大语言模型中的元认知：基础、进展与机遇
papers.abstract: This survey organizes the foundations, measurement methods, implementation approaches, and open opportunities for metacognition in large language models.
papers.abstract_zh: 这篇综述系统梳理大语言模型元认知的基础概念、测量方法、实现路径与未来机会。现有模型已经呈现部分基础元认知特征，但在自我评估、错误识别与策略调整方面仍有明显局限，后续需要更有针对性的训练和评测方法。

papers.title: MonkeyOCRv2: A Visual-Text Foundation Model for Document AI
papers.title_zh: MonkeyOCRv2：面向文档智能的视觉文本基础模型
papers.abstract: MonkeyOCRv2 is a visual-text foundation model trained on a large multilingual document corpus with a dual pre-training strategy for document parsing and understanding.
papers.abstract_zh: MonkeyOCRv2 是一个面向文档智能的视觉文本基础模型，使用大规模多语言文档语料和双重预训练策略。模型在多语言文档解析等任务上取得领先结果，同时增强了对语言上下文的利用能力并减少文本幻觉。

papers.title: Know Before Fix: QA-Driven Repository Knowledge Acquisition for Software Issue Resolution
papers.title_zh: 修复前先理解：用于软件问题解决的问答驱动仓库知识获取
papers.abstract: The work studies how repository question answering can acquire task-relevant knowledge before an agent attempts to resolve a software issue.
papers.abstract_zh: 论文研究软件修复智能体如何在动手修改之前，通过仓库问答主动获取与任务有关的项目知识。该流程把知识获取与补丁生成分离，减少因上下文理解不足导致的无效检索和错误修改。
